info.name: Autonomize AI — MedTriage Test Suite
info.description: Mirrors all 11 test cases from test_model_validation.py. Base URL: http://localhost:11434

item.name: GET api/tags — Ollama Health + Model List

request.description: Verify Ollama is running and the model is pulled.
Age 65 > 60 rule → risk_level must be high.

exec: let p; try { p = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e) { pm.test('Valid JSON', () => { throw new Error('Non-JSON: ' + raw); }); return; }

request.description: Age 18 ≤ 40, no critical symptoms → risk_level must be low.

exec: let p; try { p = JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e) { pm.test('Valid JSON', () => { throw new Error('Non-JSON: ' + raw); }); return; }

request.description: Age exactly 60 is the boundary — must return low, not high.
